sections.content: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh for micro/small enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishore (Rs 50,001 to Rs 5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5,00,001 to Rs 10 lakh). Available at all banks, NBFCs, MFIs. No collateral required. Over 40 crore loans disbursed since 2015.

Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm income generating activity. Covers: manufacturing, trading, services, agriculture-allied (food processing, poultry, fishery, bee-keeping). Not for: agriculture (crop loans), consumption. Special focus: SC/ST, women entrepreneurs, minorities.

Apply at any bank branch, NBFC, or MFI. Documents: ID proof, address proof, business plan/proposal, caste certificate (if SC/ST), quotation of machinery (if buying). Also apply via udyamimitra.in portal or psbloansin59minutes.com. No processing fee for Shishu loans. Interest rate: 7-12% depending on category and lender.
MUDRA card (like credit card) for working capital needs of Shishu/Kishore borrowers. Withdraw as needed, repay, re-withdraw. Reduces interest burden. Issued by lending bank along with loan sanction.
